title: begonia × credneri
intro: Begonia × credneri, also known as Begonia semperflorens, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Begoniaceae family, characterized by its beautiful, delicate flowers and attractive foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds, due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides, which exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Begonia × credneri include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant and antiseptic properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various skin issues. Herbal preparations of Begonia × credneri can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
